name: Hotch Potch
recipeIngredient: 4 Lamb steaks, shoulder or leg - chops, 3/4-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or stew pot, place the soup bone, split peas, onion, lettuce, salt, and water.
2. Cover and simmer over low heat for two hours.
3. Meanwhile, season the lamb steaks with salt and pepper and brown well in a skillet.
4. When the peas are tender, remove the soup bone and add the lamb to the vegetables.
5. Cook about 30 minutes longer.
6. Place the meat and vegetables in a tureen and pour the gravy over all.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
1967 BULLOCK, Helen Duprey
Recipes of Early America
Heirloom Publishing Company
New York
